title: ComBackpack
description: A high-performance, lightweight virtual backpack plugin for Paper/Spigot 1.18+. Features multiple pages, persistent storage, and immersive sound effects.
body:
# **ATTENTION**: This plugin requires **Java 21** or **higher**. Using older versions will cause the plugin to crash.

Here is how it works: you do not have to worry about losing your items because **ComBackpack** is here to help. **ComBackpack** gives every player a virtual chest that is just, for them. This virtual chest has lots of pages so you can keep all your items organized. The best part is that **ComBackpack** saves everything automatically. I made **ComBackpack** using the InventoryHolder API so it runs really smoothly and does not slow things down.

# ✨ Features:

## 3 Large Pages: 
A total of 150+ slots of extra space (excluding navigation slots).

When you use Persistent Storage your items get saved in a file called config.yml. This means that even if the server goes down and comes up your items will still be there because they are stored in this file. This is really helpful because you do not have to worry about losing your items when the server restarts. Persistent Storage makes sure that your items are safe, in the config.yml file.

## Immersive Audio: 
Custom sound effects for opening, closing, and flipping pages.

## Lightweight & Fast: 
Zero-lag implementation using optimized HashMap caching.

## Permission Support: 
Control access with the backpack.use permission.

# 💻 Commands:


```
/backpack (Alias: /bp) - Opens your personal storage
```
